worldOverview.name: City Rampage
worldOverview.description: Take on the role of a colossal creature rampaging through a sprawling metropolis. The earth trembles with every stride as you tower over the skyline, and the city below scrambles in terror while you smash everything in your path. The military throws everything it has at you — tanks, helicopters, drones, and jets — but their firepower can only do so much against someone your size.
worldOverview.systemPrompt:
The player takes on the role of a colossal creature of their choosing rampaging through a modern metropolis. The earth trembles beneath them with every step as they tower over the skyline, and the city's inhabitants flee in terror while they smash everything in their path. The military scrambles to stop them — helicopters swarm like gnats, tanks roll through the streets, and jets streak overhead — but their firepower struggles against their sheer size.

World Rules:
- The player is a giant creature of their choosing, many times taller than the buildings around them.
- The player can be damaged by the military (tanks, helicopters, drones, jets) and must take action to defend themselves and strike back.
- Smashing buildings, vehicles, and military units is the player's main way to unleash chaos.
- Stamina powers the player's attacks and movement; pausing between assaults lets it recover.
- Higher Rampage increases the player's power but also increases the military's level of force
- The player finishes the game if they are able to max out the Destruction stat.

stats.name: Health
stats.description: Represents the player's physical well-being and ability to sustain damage

descriptors.description: Critical condition. Severely wounded, barely conscious, and at risk of death.
Injured. Suffering from multiple wounds, movement impaired, combat effectiveness reduced.
Hurt. Minor injuries present, some pain, but generally functional.
Healthy. No significant injuries, operating at full capacity.

stats.name: Stamina
stats.description: Represents the player's energy and ability to perform physical actions

descriptors.description: Exhausted. Barely able to move, risk of collapse, unable to perform strenuous actions.
Tired. Movements are sluggish, difficulty in sustained physical activities.
Winded. Slightly out of breath, can perform most actions but not at peak efficiency.
Energetic. Full of energy, capable of performing any physical action without hindrance.

stats.name: Rampage
stats.description: The creature's building fury. It rises as they cause destruction and fuels their most devastating attacks.

descriptors.description: Calm. Just getting started; their blows land like an ordinary monster's.
Riled. Anger is building; their attacks hit noticeably harder.
Furious. On a tear — sweeping, building-leveling strikes.
Unstoppable. Pure destruction; nothing in the city is safe.

stats.name: Destruction
stats.description: The amount of destruction caused throughout the city by the creature.

descriptors.description: Many skyscrapers lay in ruin as the creature's presence has been made well known
All large buildings have been crushed and the remaining citizens have fled

locations.name: Neonspire
locations.playerDescription: A gleaming North American metropolis under siege by the creature.
locations.aiDescription: A gleaming North American metropolis under siege by the creature.

entities.name: Battle Tank
entities.playerDescription: A main battle tank, used by the military in a desperate attempt to stop the creature. It fires high explosive rounds.
entities.aiDescription: A main battle tank, used by the military in a desperate attempt to stop the creature. It fires high explosive rounds.

entities.name: Attack Helicopter
entities.playerDescription: An attack helicopter, deployed by the military in a frantic effort to halt the creature. It unleashes a barrage of high-powered missiles.
entities.aiDescription: An attack helicopter, deployed by the military in a frantic effort to halt the creature. It unleashes a barrage of high-powered missiles.

entities.name: Drone
entities.playerDescription: A squadron of drones, controlled remotely by skilled operators, swarms the towering creature, attempting to overwhelm them with precision strikes. But to them, the drones are just annoying flies.
entities.aiDescription: A squadron of drones, controlled remotely by skilled operators, swarms the towering creature, attempting to overwhelm them with precision strikes. But to them, the drones are just annoying flies.

entities.name: Jet Fighter
entities.playerDescription: A jet fighter soaring through the skies, it locks onto its target and releases a volley of air-to-ground missiles.
entities.aiDescription: A jet fighter soaring through the skies, it locks onto its target and releases a volley of air-to-ground missiles.

traits.name: Armored Hide
traits.playerDescription: Your skin is incredibly tough, shrugging off military fire — but all that bulk slows you down.
traits.aiDescription: The player character is resilient to ballistics but slower to move and react.

traits.name: Unrelenting
traits.playerDescription: You attack tirelessly and never let up, though you push your body hard to do it.
traits.aiDescription: The player character preserves stamina but loses health more easily.

traits.name: Short Fuse
traits.playerDescription: Your fury builds fast and runs hot, so you reach full rampage sooner.
traits.aiDescription: The player character builds Rampage quickly but loses more stamina in the process.

traits.name: Giant
traits.aiDescription: The player character is a giant human.

traits.name: Reptile
traits.playerDescription: You are a hulking reptilian Kaiju with sharp fangs and claws, crushing those below underneath your two feet.
traits.aiDescription: The player character is a bi-pedal reptilian Kaiju with sharp teeth and claws.

traits.name: Insect
traits.playerDescription: You are a hulking insectoid Kaiju with mandibles and spiked limbs, crushing those below underneath your two skittering feet.
traits.aiDescription: The player character is a bi-pedal insectoid Kaiju with mandibles and spiked limbs.

traits.name: Arachnid
traits.playerDescription: You are a hulking arachnid Kaiju with poisonous mandibles and eight massive furry legs.
traits.aiDescription: The player character is an arachnid Kaiju with poisonous mandibles and eight furry legs.
